---
title: "Contact"
---

# Contact

**Luis Mario Ramirez Cruz**

University of California Santa Cruz  

Email: lramir58@ucsc.edu  

Phone: (619) 672-3736  

---

## Professional Links

Portfolio  
https://sites.google.com/ucsc.edu/luisramirezportfolio

---

## Research Interests

- Ecological modeling
- Climate change biology
- Marine ecology
- Computational ecology
- Conservation science
